Ticket to Paradise (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $68,275,985Details
International Box Office $100,300,996
Worldwide Box Office $168,576,981
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,643,450
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,456,622
Total $5,100,072
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Exes David and Georgia find themselves on a shared mission to stop their lovestruck daughter from making the same mistake they once made after they learn that she is planning to marry a man she just met.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,509,095 (24.2% of total gross)
Legs:4.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,543 opening theaters/4,066 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $77,545,040

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: September 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Ingresso para o Paraíso (Brazil)
September 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Viaje al paraíso (Ecuador)
September 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Ticket to Paradise (Εισιτήριο για τον Παράδεισο) (Greece)
September 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Viaje al paraíso (Uruguay)
September 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Viaje al paraíso (Bolivia)
Video Release: November 8th, 2022 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some strong language and brief suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2738 (cert #53884), 6/29/2022)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Filming location (country): Australia
Plot point: Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Social setting: Wedding Day
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Working Title Films, Smokehouse Pictures, Red Om Films, Universal Pictures
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English
